title: Megopiza longirostris

taxonomy: Megopiza longirostris is a species of bird, specifically a type of finch. It belongs to the family Fringillidae, which is a large family of small birds that includes finches, sparrows, and some related species. The genus Megopiza is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species, M. longirostris. Megopiza longirostris is a member of the order Passeriformes, which includes perching birds. This classification reflects its physical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other birds.
